abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.text: This model can move through other models.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Guttural Pummeling
actions.costs_and_restrictions: The first raise this attack receives increases its Dmg by +2 instead of +1.

triggers.name: Whirlwind Attack
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (melee)2" of this model.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

actions.name: Toss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This may target friendly models. Target a model of lower Sz than this model.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 10" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Failing does not end this movement.

triggers.name: Cojo SMASH
triggers.text: Enemy only. Place this model within 1" of the target. Enemy models within (melee)3" gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Sweep Away
actions.effects: Move any number of enemy models within range up to 3" directly away from this model.

triggers.name: The Fear of Pursuit
triggers.text: Models moved by this action gain an Adversary token.
